name: AI Video Bot v6 - Superflow FINAL

parameters.text:
AI Video Bot v6 Superflow - Commands

CREATE - Auto video on trending topic
TOPIC: [text] - Specific topic
NICHE: [text] - Set category
QUALITY:HIGH - Force 9+ quality score
BUDGET:FREE - Free tools only

LANGUAGE:
LANG:HINDI CREATE - Hindi video (Taksh voice)
LANG:HINDI TOPIC: [text] - Hindi on topic
LANG:SPANISH CREATE - Spanish video

VOICE:
VOICETEST: [topic] - 30sec clip all 4 voices
VOICE REPORT - Voice performance stats

THUMBNAIL:
THUMBNAIL:1 / :2 / :3 - Pick thumbnail option

DRAMA / SERIES:
DRAMA: [topic] - Cinematic drama style
SERIES: [name] EP[number] - Episode series

APPROVAL:
PUBLISH - Post to all 7 platforms
REJECT - Discard video
EDIT: [notes] - Redo with changes

SYSTEM:
STATUS - System health + stats
COST - Monthly spend report
PAUSE - Halt all scheduled runs
RESUME - Restart scheduled runs
SECURITY LOG - Recent security events

Upload YOUR OWN VIDEO with a caption:
- EDIT: make this cinematic
- EDIT: add dramatic captions
- (no caption) = auto-enhance

Platforms: YouTube, Shorts, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, Snapchat
Video rejected. Send CREATE or upload your own video to start again.

additionalFields.caption:
Voice 1: TAKSH - Hindi / Warm Cultural
Stability: 0.35 | Style: 0.25
Best for: South Asian topics, cultural content

Voice 3: MAX - Documentary / Educational (DEFAULT)
Stability: 0.35 | Style: 0.20
Best for: General content, documentaries, science

parameters.text:
=Voice Test Complete for: '{{ $json.voicetestTopic || 'your topic' }}'

You heard:
1. TAKSH - Hindi/Warm cultural narrator
3. MAX - Documentary/Educational (current default)

Also available (auto-selected by mood):
2. BRADFORD - Serious, political, dark topics
4. SAMANTHA - Emotional, true crime, intimate

Voice auto-selects based on script mood.
To override: include VOICE:1 VOICE:2 VOICE:3 or VOICE:4 in your TOPIC command.

Send VOICE REPORT to see performance stats.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: ={{ ($json.ai_video_prompts || [])[0] || 'cinematic documentary scene dramatic lighting 4K' }}, photorealistic no text no watermark 9:16 vertical

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: ={"body":"VIDEO READY: {{ $json.title }} | {{ $json.videoUrl }} | Quality: {{ ($json.qualityScore||{}).total_score||'?' }}/50 | Reply PUBLISH or REJECT"}

parameters.text:
=BUDGET ALERT

Monthly spend: ${{ $json.monthlyCostTotal }}
Limit: $80

Consider pausing non-essential videos.
Send PAUSE to halt scheduled runs.
Auto-pause triggers at $100.
